productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Western Spirit Red Shirt
description: Composition Red and white checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a full front press button placket, short sleeves, yoked back, one pocket on left chest with stitch detail and branding and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Flat dry in shade or tumble dry Warm iron do not iron on decorations wrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down &ndash this stylish shirt with its spread collar is just asking to be paired with a cowboy style shoestring tie. The soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for that perfect semi-formal look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
